name: Bean Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup diced red or green pepper
1/2 cup frozen whole kernel corn (thawed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the kidney beans in a medium bowl and mash to desired consistency.
2. Coat a small nonstick skillet with cooking spray.
3. Add oil and place over medium heat until hot.
4. Add onion, red bell pepper, and garlic; sauté for 5 minutes or until onion is tender.
5. Stir in cumin, coriander, and white pepper. Cook for 1 minute, then remove from heat.
6. Add the onion mixture and corn to the beans. Stir well.
7. Divide the bean mixture evenly among the tortillas, spreading to edges.
8. Sprinkle 3 tablespoons cheese down the center of each tortilla.
9. Roll up; place seam side down on a baking sheet.
10. Bake at 425°F for 5 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
11. Spoon salsa over burritos. Serve warm. (About 353 calories per burrito and 1/4 cup salsa, 12.1 fat, 22 cholesterol)
